title: .NET/SQL Consultant
summary: Modernized legacy .NET applications and improved database quality and performance with SQL work.
highlights: Migrated legacy VB/ASP.NET applications to ASP.NET with C#, Razor, and Entity Framework.
Authored SQL stored procedures and data-fix scripts to improve data quality and performance.
manual_highlights: Migrated projects from Visual Basic to ASP.NET as part of legacy application modernization work.
Performed extensive database data consistency reviews and corrections across business-critical datasets.
Implemented and ran SQL queries to investigate, validate, and repair data issues.
Implemented numerous stored procedures to support application behavior and database operations.

manual_notes.note: Normalized structured skills from existing Liberty Power experience highlights: ASP.NET, C#, Razor, Entity Framework, and SQL work.
Migrated projects from Visual Basic to ASP.NET.
Performed extensive database data consistency revisions, implemented and executed SQL queries, and implemented many stored procedures.

source.notes: Parsed from JOSE BANDE SERRANO RESUME V6.pdf
